title: Chest Searchbar Forge
description: Allows you to search for items in chests, now ported to forge!
body:
# Chest Searchbar Forge

[![Language](https://img.shields.io/badge/language-Java-orange?logo=openjdk)](https://openjdk.org)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/chest-searchbar-forge?logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth%20Downloads&color=00AF5C)](https://modrinth.com/project/chest-searchbar-forge)
![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.7.10%20%7C%201.12.2%20%7C%201.16.5%20%7C%201.18.2%20%7C%201.19.4%20%7C%201.21.1-brightgreen)
[![Forge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Forge-orange?logo=curseforge)](https://files.minecraftforge.net)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-ARR-blue)

---
A mod that adds searchbars into your chests, now ported to Forge for newer/older versions of Minecraft

~~I will think on adding NeoForge support.~~ There will be **no NeoForge support** as it is too new, also there are versions down below.

***THERE ARE NO PREREQUISITES FOR THIS MOD!***

This mod is inspired off of [Chest Searchbar,](https://modrinth.com/mod/chest-search-bar) I highly recommend you check it out as this is what this mod is inspired by.

## IF YOU WANT 1.20.1, GO TO THE ORIGINAL MOD.

# How to use this mod
As opposed to the other mod, **this mod doesnt filter out the search results, it instead indexes the search result**, if you need another example, this gif will show you what I mean.

![As "diamond" is searched into the searchbar, it grays out the items that dont contain diamond and shows the diamond items "Diamonds" and "Diamond Blocks"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/622e3c0032071376195d17f3b3d8ba9ccbc93eb1.gif)

**I currently dont have plans to port to any other version, but if you need this mod ported for another version, ask me and i'll help!**
